multi_step: Solving requires first extracting the probability density function from the figure, then computing the mean square value E[v^2].
This is a graph-to-math task, likely involving identifying intervals/heights and then performing integration or equivalent area-weighted calculation.
The prompt is not multiple-choice, so the solver must derive a numeric result rather than recognize one.
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single value ('8'), which is easy to compare against a computed result.
The expected solution process is mathematically checkable once the graph is interpreted.
answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support downstream verification.
